title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for an experienced Senior Frontend Developer to join our growing engineering team at Infosys. You will be responsible for building and maintaining high-quality web applications that serve millions of users across India. This is an exciting opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain responsive, performant web applications using React.js and modern JavaScript
Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement pixel-perfect interfaces
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices
Participate in code reviews and mentor junior developers
Optimize application performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility
Work closely with backend teams to integrate REST APIs and GraphQL endpoints
Contribute to architectural decisions and technical roadmap discussions
Ensure accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1) are met across all features
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
3–6 years of professional experience in frontend development
Strong proficiency in React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), and TypeScript
Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Zustand, or Context API)
Familiarity with CSS frameworks (Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, or Material UI)
Knowledge of testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library)
Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Strong communication and teamwork abilities
benefits: Competitive salary with annual performance bonuses
Health insurance for self, spouse, and dependents
Paid leaves: 24 days annual + 12 days sick leave

company_info.name: Infosys Limited
company_info.about: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 50+ countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: Flipkart is India's leading e-commerce marketplace and we are seeking a passionate Digital Marketing Manager to drive our online marketing campaigns. You will plan and execute data-driven marketing strategies to acquire and retain customers across digital channels.
responsibilities: Plan, execute, and optimize end-to-end digital marketing campaigns (SEO, SEM, Social, Email)
Manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other paid media platforms with monthly budgets of ₹50L+
Analyze campaign performance using Google Analytics, Adobe Analytics, and internal dashboards
Develop content strategy in collaboration with creative teams
Monitor competitors and identify new growth opportunities
Generate weekly and monthly performance reports for leadership
Manage and grow social media presence across all platforms
Coordinate with product and engineering teams for landing page optimization
requirements: 2–5 years of experience in digital marketing with proven track record
Google Ads and Meta Blueprint certifications preferred
Strong analytical skills with proficiency in Google Analytics and Excel
Experience managing large advertising budgets
Knowledge of SEO best practices and content marketing
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and Hindi
MBA in Marketing from a reputed institution preferred
Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment
benefits: Flipkart employee discount (30% on all purchases)
Annual team outings and offsite trips
Flexi-hours and 2 days WFH per week
Modern office with free food and beverages

company_info.name: Flipkart Internet Pvt. Ltd.
company_info.about: Flipkart is India's leading e-commerce marketplace, headquartered in Bengaluru, India. It was founded in 2007 by Sachin Bansal and Binny Bansal. With over 400 million registered users and 150 million products across 80+ categories, Flipkart is transforming the way India shops.

title: Data Scientist – ML & AI
description: TCS is hiring a Data Scientist with expertise in machine learning and artificial intelligence to join our AI & Analytics Center of Excellence. You will work on high-impact projects for Fortune 500 clients, building predictive models, recommendation systems, and generative AI solutions.
responsibilities: Design and develop machine learning models for classification, regression, and clustering problems
Build and deploy NLP solutions including text classification, sentiment analysis, and named entity recognition
Work with large datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn) and SQL
Create data pipelines and ETL processes for model training and inference
Present findings and model results to technical and non-technical stakeholders
Collaborate with data engineers and MLOps teams for model deployment on AWS/Azure
Stay current with research papers and integrate state-of-the-art techniques
Mentor junior data scientists and analysts in the team
requirements: Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related field
4–8 years of hands-on experience in data science and machine learning
Strong programming skills in Python (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)
Proficiency in SQL and experience with big data tools (Spark, Hadoop)
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS SageMaker, Azure ML, or GCP Vertex AI)
Knowledge of deep learning architectures (CNNs, RNNs, Transformers)
Excellent statistical analysis and modeling skills
Strong presentation and storytelling skills with data
benefits: Comprehensive medical insurance including dental and vision
Dedicated AI/ML learning portal with Coursera and Udemy access
Free tech certifications (AWS, GCP, Azure) sponsored by TCS
Flexible working hours with WFH options
Sabbatical leave program for research and advanced studies

company_info.name: Tata Consultancy Services
company_info.about: TCS is an IT services, consulting and business solutions organization that has been partnering with many of the world's largest businesses in their transformation journeys for over 55 years. TCS offers a consulting-led, cognitive powered, integrated portfolio of business, technology and engineering services.

title: HR Business Partner
description: Zomato is looking for a dynamic HR Business Partner to support our growing operations team. You will serve as the primary HR point of contact for business leaders, driving talent strategies, employee engagement, and organizational effectiveness across key business units.
responsibilities: Partner with business leaders to develop and execute HR strategies aligned with business goals
Lead end-to-end recruitment for mid to senior-level positions across departments
Drive employee engagement initiatives and monitor attrition trends
Handle employee relations cases including performance improvement plans and disciplinary actions
Manage and optimize HRIS systems (Darwinbox/Workday) for accurate data management
Support organizational design and workforce planning exercises
Conduct exit interviews and derive actionable insights to reduce attrition
Ensure compliance with Indian labour laws and company HR policies
requirements: MBA/PGDM in Human Resources from a reputed B-school
2–4 years of experience as an HR generalist or HR BP in a fast-growing startup or MNC
Strong knowledge of Indian labour laws (PF, ESI, Shops & Establishment Act)
Proficiency with HRIS tools like Darwinbox, Workday, or SAP SuccessFactors
Excellent interpersonal and stakeholder management skills
Ability to work in a high-growth, ambiguous environment
Strong data analytics skills for HR metrics and dashboards
Experience in tech/startup culture is an added advantage
benefits: Fun workplace culture with regular team events
Career growth in a hypergrowth startup

company_info.name: Zomato Ltd.
company_info.about: Zomato is India's leading food delivery and restaurant discovery platform, serving 800+ cities with over 300,000 restaurant partners. Founded in 2008, Zomato has grown to become a publicly listed company and one of India's most recognizable consumer internet brands.

title: Product Manager – FinTech
description: Paytm is seeking an experienced Product Manager to lead the development of innovative FinTech products that are redefining how Indians manage money, make payments, and access financial services. You will own the product roadmap for one of our high-growth verticals.
responsibilities: Own and drive the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for the assigned FinTech vertical
Gather, prioritize, and translate user needs into clear product requirements and user stories
Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, data, and business teams to deliver products on time
Define and monitor KPIs to measure product success and drive data-informed decisions
Conduct user research, competitive analysis, and market sizing studies
Lead A/B experiments and continuously optimize the product based on learnings
Manage stakeholder communication and executive-level presentations
Partner with regulatory and compliance teams to ensure products meet RBI guidelines
requirements: 5–9 years of experience in product management, with at least 2 years in FinTech
MBA from IIM or equivalent top-tier B-school, or B.Tech from IIT preferred
Strong analytical mindset with proficiency in SQL and product analytics tools
Deep understanding of UPI, digital payments, lending, or wealth management products
Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies and tools like JIRA
Excellent communication and influencing skills for cross-functional leadership
Track record of launching successful products with measurable business impact
Knowledge of RBI regulations and FinTech compliance is a plus
benefits: Premium health, dental, and vision insurance
Executive coaching and leadership development programs

company_info.name: Paytm (One97 Communications)
company_info.about: Paytm is India's leading digital payments and financial services company. Founded in 2010 by Vijay Shekhar Sharma, Paytm has revolutionized digital payments in India with products including Paytm Wallet, UPI, Paytm Payments Bank, insurance, mutual funds, and lending products.
